'''Carl Barzon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Professor/Legends|professor]] at the [[University of Garos]] and a secret member of the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification]].

==Biography==
Carl Barzon was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="SD" /> from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sundari (planet)|Sundari]]. He emigrated to the neighboring planet of [[Garos IV]] as a student, attending the [[University of Garos]] to conduct graduate work. Barzon remained on Garos IV, becoming a well-respected teaching [[Professor/Legends|professor]] and research [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Barzon began researching the [[Ore/Legends|ore]] [[Hibridium/Legends|hibridium]]. Only found on the western coastline of Garos IV's main continent, hibridium possessed natural cloaking properties. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a presence on Garos IV around [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], Barzon joined the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification]], an anti-Imperial resistance movement. The professor feared that if the Empire obtained his research on hibridium, they would be able to fashion weapons capable of dominating [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="GH" />
